title: Relay: Schedule purge_expired() periodically
description:
purge_expired() exists in store.rs but is never called. Expired messages accumulate in message_queue indefinitely, growing the SQLite file without bound.

Required:
- Spawn a tokio task in relay/src/main.rs that calls store.purge_expired() every hour
- Log how many rows were purged
- Also purge expired subscriptions (add purge_expired_subscriptions() to Store)
- Remove #[allow(dead_code)] from purge_expired() once it's wired up
close_reason: message_queue table removed in broadcast redesign; purge_expired() was tied to it. Subscription TTL cleanup is still needed but is a 3-line addition to nie-wjv's scope.
